TBTA wind restriction and storm protocol adjustments

payload.claim_text: TBTA made adjustments to both its Wind Restriction and Coastal and Severe Storm protocols based on structural changes at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge, allowing trucks carrying cargo to safely traverse the upper level at certain wind speeds.
payload.description: TBTA wind restriction and storm protocol adjustments for 2023

tool_args.label: Tunnel portal flood door testing

payload.claim_text: TBTA conducted annual tunnel portal flood door testing at the Hugh L. Carey Tunnel and Queens Midtown Tunnel. Each tunnel entrance is sealed by a 20-ton steel door approximately 29-feet wide by 14-feet high, and nearly 2 feet thick.
payload.description: Annual testing of 20-ton flood doors at TBTA tunnels

tool_args.label: Water Inflated Property Protector flood barriers

payload.claim_text: TBTA has a total of 11 Water Inflated Property Protector (WIPP) flood barriers, measuring 4 feet high by 9 feet wide, and ranging from 35 feet to 85 feet in length, used for flood protection at selected building facilities.
payload.description: WIPP flood barrier details

tool_args.label: Tunnel Portal Flood Doors

payload.description: 20-ton steel door approximately 29-feet wide by 14-feet high, and nearly 2 feet thick, sealing each tunnel entrance

tool_args.label: Water Inflated Property Protector (WIPP) Flood Barriers

payload.description: Water Inflated Property Protector flood barriers; total of 11 WIPPs, measuring 4 feet high by 9 feet wide, ranging from 35 feet to 85 feet in length

tool_args.label: Stop Log System - Queens Midtown Tunnel

payload.description: Permanent deployable flood measure designed to a flood elevation 4 feet higher than Superstorm Sandy

tool_args.label: Aqua Fence System - Hugh L. Carey Tunnel

payload.description: Permanent deployable flood measure designed to a flood elevation 4 feet higher than Superstorm Sandy

tool_args.label: Wind Deflectors - Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

payload.description: Translucent wind deflectors installed on the upper level of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge adjacent to the towers, designed to diffuse wind pressure and mitigate impacts to crossing traffic
